description:
SSOT for agent roles. Each role declares allowed_paths (glob patterns) and forbidden_paths (glob patterns). agentguard verify reads the PR's changed-file list and the declared role, then rejects diffs that touch forbidden paths or contain only-not-allowed paths.

A role's effective rule is: every changed file must match at least one allowed_paths glob, AND must not match any forbidden_paths glob. forbidden_paths win on conflict.

See contracts/AGENT_CONTRACT.md for the human-readable mirror.

roles.label: Designer / human-driven implementer
roles.description: The primary author class. Can touch any file in any repo. Subject to manual review and other CI gates, not to the path allowlist.

roles.label: Contract Fuzzer Agent / IR Mutation Scout
roles.description: Low-context closed-loop probe. Generates small candidates and lets verifiers decide. Never makes semantic decisions, never modifies accepted contracts, schemas, decisions, verifier code, or CI workflows. Allowed task types: positive fixture, negative fixture, fuzz corpus expansion, manifest normalization, failure minimization.

pr_isolation.rationale: Forbidding the dumb agent from touching verifier code in the same PR prevents it from weakening tests to make its candidates pass.

roles.label: Verifier / schema / test author
roles.description: Modifies verifier logic, schemas, or tests. May NOT touch candidate-space in the same PR. Subject to manual review of the verifier change.
